# Hikube Documentation

> Hikube is a 100% Swiss sovereign cloud platform offering managed Kubernetes,
> GPU as a Service, virtual machines, S3 object storage,
> managed databases and messaging.
> Triple replication across 3 Swiss datacenters (Geneva, Gland, Lucerne).
> nLPD/GDPR compliant, CLOUD Act immune, ISO 27001.

## Available languages

This documentation is available in 4 languages:

- [Français](https://docs.hikube.cloud/)
- [English](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/)
- [Italiano](https://docs.hikube.cloud/it/)
- [Deutsch](https://docs.hikube.cloud/de/)

## Getting started

- [Home](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/)
- [Introduction to Hikube](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/getting-started/introduction/)
- [Key concepts](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/getting-started/concepts/)
- [Quick start](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/getting-started/quick-start/)

## Managed Kubernetes

- [Overview](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/services/kubernetes/overview/)

- [Plugins: Cilium, CoreDNS, Ingress NGINX, Cert-Manager, FluxCD, Velero](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/services/kubernetes/plugins/cilium/)
- [API Reference](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/services/kubernetes/api-reference/)
- [FAQ](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/services/kubernetes/faq/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.hikube.cloud/en/services/kubernetes/troubleshooting/)
